title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
